path: Sources PIK/PIK-5-Extended-Core-Kit/Phase 01 - Ecosystemize/PIK 5-0 - Platform Opportunity - ENG.pdf
text: PLATFORM OPPORTUNITY Part of the Platform Innovation Kit - the toolset for the platform generation Download at www.platforminnovationkit.com Created by fastbreak.one Inspired by Magic Triangle of Prof. Oliver Gassmann TITLEOPPORTU-NITITY REVENUE MODEL CAPA- BILITIES VALUE PROPO- SITION PARTNERS CORE VALUE PROPOSITION(S) What is the core value proposition / service of the platform? (see also platform patterns) ENG ADDRESSABLE MARKET What is the Serviceable Addressable Market (SAM) – the part of the total addressable market that you can access or service? BUSINESS MODEL How do you want to earn money? INFRASTRUCTURE What are essential infrastructure resources you must build? INTELLIGIENCE / DATA What are key intelligence capabilities based on data you must develop? CONSUMERS Who are your main consumer segments? CONSUMERS PRODUCERS CONSUMER NEEDS What are the core needs of your consumers? Why do they need your platform? PARTNERS Who are your main partner segments? PARTNER NEEDS What are the core needs of your partners? Why do they need your platform? PRODUCERS Who are your main producer segments? PRODUCER NEEDS What are the core needs of your producers? Why do they need your platform? IMPACT TO ECOSYSTEM What is the positive impact to Society and Environment? How does the platform incorporates circular economy aspects and helps to achieve sustainability goals? PIK
